title: Improved Buttons
description: Adds a lovely trim around the outside of buttons, providing a nice contrast for buttons!
body:
![Banner spelling "Improved Buttons" with an example highlighted](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/06dde8219ed8d66b8929a63e67f1375b6194a263_0.webp)

This resource pack adds a simple trim around the outside of vanilla Minecraft buttons in an attempt to make them look slightly more interesting! All current button variants through version 1.21 have been improved.

<details>
<summary>Button Preview Graphic</summary>
  
![Graphic showing every button variant in detail](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9eb90dc1e23394ed31fcc6388391becfe88dcb6d.png)

</details>
